            SELECT

                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_whitelisted = true) as whitelisted_users,
                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_login_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as active_last_7d,
                COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_login_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') as active_last_30d

[SQL: 
            SELECT
                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as users,
                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM organizations) as organizations,
                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspaces) as workspaces,
                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_units) as knowledge_units,
                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM external_conversations) as conversations,
                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processing_jobs) as total_jobs LIMIT 1000]

(psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column "user_id" does not exist
LINE 8:             SELECT user_id, date_trunc('week', last_login_at...
                           ^

[SQL: 
        WITH cohorts AS (
            SELECT id, date_trunc('week', created_at)::date as cohort_week
            FROM users
            WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '4 weeks'
        ),
        activity AS (
            SELECT user_id, date_trunc('week', last_login_at)::date as active_week
            FROM users
            WHERE last_login_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '4 weeks'
        )
        SELECT c.cohort_week,
               COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as cohort_size,
               COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) as retained
        FROM cohorts c
        LEFT JOIN activity a ON c.id = a.user_id AND a.active_week >= c.cohort_week
        GROUP BY c.cohort_week
        ORDER BY c.cohort_week LIMIT 1000]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)

data.message:
The current system status shows:
- Total users: 2
- Whitelisted users: 1
- Users active in the last 7 days: 2
- Users active in the last 30 days: 2
- Total workspaces: 1
- Total organizations: 1
- Jobs processed in the last 24 hours: 66

This indicates the system is active with ongoing job processing and user engagement.

If you want, I can provide more detailed health or performance metrics. Would you like that?

alert_traces.message: Failed to extract params for /api/debug/infra/alerts: 'ModelField' object has no attribute 'type_annotation'

data.query:
// AI-generated query for: Show me the top 5 slowest requests in the last hour
requests
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize count() by name
data.question: Show me the top 5 slowest requests in the last hour

tools.name: get_business_pulse
tools.description: Get real-time business pulse metrics: users, workspaces, jobs, activity.

tools.name: get_growth_metrics
tools.description: Get user and workspace growth over time.

tools.name: get_engagement_metrics
tools.description: Get user engagement metrics: login frequency, active rates.

tools.name: get_feature_adoption
tools.description: Get feature adoption rates across workspaces.

tools.name: get_retention_cohorts
tools.description: Get weekly retention cohort data.

tools.name: get_unit_economics
tools.description: Get unit economics: cost per user, cost per workspace.

tools.name: get_top_workspaces
tools.description: Get top workspaces by activity (job count).

tools.name: get_pipeline_health
tools.description: Get processing pipeline health: success rates, queue depths, throughput.

tools.name: get_cost_breakdown
tools.description: Get Azure cost breakdown by service.

tools.name: get_active_users
tools.description: Get active users with activity metrics and login recency.

tools.name: get_scaling_metrics
tools.description: Get scaling and capacity metrics: conversation growth, job throughput, knowledge accumulation.

tools.name: get_error_timeline
tools.description: Get error count timeline grouped by service.

tools.name: get_error_clusters
tools.description: Get top error clusters grouped by problem ID.

tools.name: get_error_detail
tools.description: Get detailed info for a specific error by problem ID.

tools.name: get_error_correlation
tools.description: Correlate an error with its full request trace.

tools.name: get_deploy_error_correlation
tools.description: Correlate error spikes with deployment events.

tools.name: get_failed_jobs
tools.description: Get recent failed processing jobs.

tools.name: get_service_resources
tools.description: Get resource allocation and status for all services.

tools.name: get_resource_quotas
tools.description: Get database resource quotas and usage.

tools.name: get_scale_events
tools.description: Get auto-scale events from App Insights.

tools.name: get_bottleneck_analysis
tools.description: Identify performance bottlenecks from slow requests and dependencies.

tools.name: get_database_performance
tools.description: Get database performance metrics: slow queries, table sizes, connections.

tools.name: get_infra_topology
tools.description: Get full infrastructure topology: all services and their relationships.

tools.name: list_container_apps
tools.description: List all container apps with their status.

tools.name: get_container_apps_detailed
tools.description: Get all container apps with detailed info, revisions, and runtime metrics.

tools.name: get_container_app_detail
tools.description: Get detailed info for a specific container app.

tools.name: get_container_app_logs
tools.description: Get recent logs for a container app.

tools.name: get_postgresql_status
tools.description: Get PostgreSQL database status and metrics.

tools.name: get_neo4j_status
tools.description: Get Neo4j graph database status, scaling metrics, and per-workspace breakdown.

tools.name: get_service_bus_status
tools.description: Get Azure Service Bus queues, metrics, and throughput.

tools.name: get_storage_status
tools.description: Get Azure Blob Storage status and statistics.

tools.name: get_openai_status
tools.description: Get Azure OpenAI usage metrics from App Insights.

tools.name: get_key_vault_status
tools.description: Get Key Vault access logs from App Insights.

tools.name: get_front_door_metrics
tools.description: Get Front Door request metrics from App Insights.

tools.name: get_vnet_status
tools.description: Get VNet connectivity status from dependency telemetry.

tools.name: get_app_insights_status
tools.description: Get App Insights telemetry overview.

tools.name: get_infra_costs
tools.description: Get daily infrastructure cost trend with resource-level breakdown and forecast.

tools.name: get_alerts_status
tools.description: Get Azure Monitor alert rules and recently fired alerts.

tools.name: get_deployments
tools.description: Get deployment history across all container apps (revisions).

tools.name: get_database_metrics
tools.description: Get comprehensive database metrics: counts, activity, health, cache, tables, queries.

tools.name: get_llm_costs
tools.description: Get LLM usage costs from App Insights custom events (llm_request_complete).

tools.name: get_llm_metrics
tools.description: Get Azure OpenAI metrics from App Insights dependency telemetry.

tools.name: execute_kql_query
tools.description: Execute a KQL query against App Insights.

tools.name: list_saved_queries
tools.description: List all saved KQL queries.

tools.name: save_kql_query
tools.description: Save a KQL query for reuse.

tools.name: ai_generate_kql
tools.description: Generate a KQL query from natural language description.

tools.name: get_request_trace
tools.description: Get full distributed trace for a request by operation ID.

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all workspaces with member counts, paginated.

tools.name: get_workspace_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information for a specific workspace.

tools.name: get_workspace_health
tools.description: Get health status for a specific workspace across all data stores.

tools.name: get_workspace_jobs
tools.description: Get processing jobs for a workspace with optional status filter.

tools.name: get_workspace_conversations
tools.description: Get external conversations linked to a workspace.

tools.name: get_workspace_graph_stats
tools.description: Get knowledge graph statistics for a workspace.

tools.name: get_health_score
tools.description: Get overall data health score across all data stores.

tools.name: check_data_consistency
tools.description: Check data consistency: orphaned records, broken references.

tools.name: find_orphaned_records
tools.description: Find orphaned records across all tables.

tools.name: check_encryption_status
tools.description: Check encryption status across data stores.

tools.name: run_health_check
tools.description: Run a comprehensive health check across all data stores.

tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against PostgreSQL.

tools.name: execute_cypher_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only Cypher query against Neo4j.

tools.name: whitelist_user
tools.description: Whitelist a user by email address.

tools.name: whitelist_organization
tools.description: Whitelist all users in an organization by domain.

tools.name: list_whitelisted
tools.description: List all whitelisted users.

tools.name: purge_queue
tools.description: Purge all messages from a Service Bus queue (active + dead-letter).

tools.name: ai_chat
tools.description: Chat with AI assistant that can query all debug endpoints.

tools.name: get_api_performance
tools.description: Get per-endpoint latency distribution (P50/P95/P99), error rate, request volume.

tools.name: get_dependency_map
tools.description: Get service-to-service dependency graph with latency and failure rates.

tools.name: get_error_hotspots
tools.description: Get which endpoints throw which errors — correlates exceptions to API requests.

tools.name: get_throughput_trends
tools.description: Get time-series of request volume, error count, and latency per service.

tools.name: get_slo_status
tools.description: Compute SLO metrics: availability, latency, error budget.
